parameters:
There's a mysterious magic circle... Touch it?
(＊H-scene will start)

Upon touching the magic circle, everything before my
eyes turned pure white...!
Gyaaaaah! I've got a bad feeling about this!!

As soon as I was enveloped in the blinding light
again, there was my mother, completely naked and
collapsed before me...

Unbelievable...! The masturbation aid I was just using
was actually my mother, transformed by some mysterious
power...!!

Haah... haah... (I thought I was really going to die
from cumming too much...)
Why is it always me who ends up like this...

Since you're safely back to normal now, alright, let's
go! (Sage mode activated)
You obtained a Potion of Revival!
Light a bonfire? (You can save and return at bonfires)

You need a torch to light a bonfire (Make one at the
workbench)
